title: Audit Record
description: Schema for a single audit record. Every meaningful agent action must produce one of these.

run_id.description: Unique identifier for this workflow run.

workflow_id.description: Identifier of the workflow that generated this audit record.

project_id.description: Unique project identifier this workflow run applies to.

status.description: Final status of the workflow run.

started_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the workflow run started.

completed_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the workflow run completed.

triggered_by.description: Description of who or what triggered the run (user ID, scheduler job, etc.).

confidence.description: Confidence level in the workflow output (0-100). Below 70 requires explicit assumptions.

sources_used.description: List of data sources successfully used during the workflow run.

unavailable_sources.description: List of data sources that were unavailable or failed during the run.

assumptions.description: Assumptions made during the workflow run.

proposed_external_actions.description: External actions proposed but not yet executed (require approval).

target_system.description: System the action would target (jira, github, email, slack, etc.).

approval_required.description: Whether this action requires human approval.

approval_id.description: Reference to approval record if approval was requested.

approval_status.description: Approval status for this workflow run if external mutations were proposed.

output_path.description: Filesystem path or reference to the generated output file.

error_message.description: Error message if status is failed.
